hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates a REST HTTP API client from an OpenAPI description file.

commands.name: search
commands.description: Searches for an OpenAPI description in multiple registries.

commands.name: download
commands.description: Downloads an OpenAPI description from multiple registries.

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The search result key to download the description for. Use the search command to get the key.

commands.name: show
commands.description: Displays the API tree in a given description.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Displays information about the languages supported by kiota and dependencies to add in your project.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Updates existing clients under the target directory using their lock files.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Logs in to the Kiota registries so search/download/show/generate commands can access private API definitions.

commands.name: device
commands.description: Logs in to GitHub using a device code flow.

commands.name: pat
commands.description: Logs in to GitHub using a Personal Access Token.

commands.name: rpc
commands.description: WARNING EXPERIMENTAL: Starts a kiota as a JSON-RPC server.
